subject: Scaffold the arcade-game stack: playable mobile-first platformer (#1)

build: add Capacitor Android platform (#4)
chore: flip directive to RELEASED — scaffold milestone complete (#6)
feat: combat system (whip + stomp kills) (#8)

overrides.reason: scale/flicker/death are sim+interpolation logic proven by unit tests; cutscene + font visuals are proven live on Pages in the milestone playtest that closes this branch.

subject: feat: overworld biome + village level + multi-level story flow + NPCs

overrides.reason: this commit is gameplay/flow wiring; the village composition is intentionally a first pass and is re-crafted (deliberate painterly layout) in the immediately following commit before the Pages playtest.

subject: feat: CRAFT the village — studied the palette, composed with real depth

overrides.reason: composition-only data change to one level's stamp list; proven live by Safari GPU screenshot read + reviewed against the studied palette this same session.

subject: feat: dedicated landing scene with devil-may-care GenAI hero + clean wordmark

overrides.reason: new static landing UI proven live this session by Safari GPU screenshot read + reviewed; the milestone Pages playtest re-verifies it in production.

subject: fix: stop the village death-loop — touch-pointer leak + i-frames + patrol-only intro (#13)

overrides.reason: the only render change is an alpha blink driven by the invuln timer; gameplay logic is covered by unit + browser tests and the fix was proven live this session by a Safari GPU screenshot read.

subject: chore: flip directive to RELEASED — Milestone 3 shipped + live-verified (#14)
fix: slice single torch/cookfire/statue (not whole sheets) + safe-area padding

overrides.reason: stamp-rect data + CSS safe-area padding; every slice was audited via a rendered contact sheet this session and the village + landing re-verified live at phone viewport.

subject: feat: device-profile landscape lock — phones lock, foldables/tablets stay free

overrides.reason: renderer reverted to its prior cover-by-height scaling; the new orientation overlay + lock are proven live this session (portrait prompt + landscape fill) at real phone viewports and unit-tested.

subject: feat: multi-aspect GenAI scenes — 16:9 / 9:16 / 1:1 picked per viewport

overrides.reason: adds aspect-variant image assets + selection logic; the cutscene/landing render path is unchanged except which crop loads, and the portrait hero variant was reviewed live this session.

subject: fix: address PR #15 review — debounce orientation sync, drop stale comment, test readOrientationState

overrides.reason: a comment-only edit plus a debounce on the orientation state update; nothing rendered changes, and the orientation behaviour is covered by the expanded unit tests.

subject: feat: fully-layered NPCs — use the whole paper-doll part library

overrides.reason: NPC paper-doll spec data only; the composited sprites were verified via a rendered layer-stack contact sheet this session and the watchman's sword confirmed live in the village.

subject: fix: scale NPCs by content height — villagers were tiny next to Jim

overrides.reason: a scale-table entry + one renderer constant; the NPC peer-size ratio is unit-tested and the corrected village was screenshot-verified live this session.

subject: feat: NPC dialogue in a dedicated bottom text bar (the HUD frames the play area)

overrides.reason: new bottom dialogue UI proven live this session (talk prompt + speech window screenshot-verified) and the store is unit-tested; the gameplay render path is unchanged.

subject: feat: framed top HUD bar (score + lives strip) to complete the cabinet frame

overrides.reason: restyles the existing HUD overlay into a top strip; same data, proven live this session against the village.

subject: feat: pot-smash debris burst — satisfying smash juice at the pot

overrides.reason: adds a particle burst on pot-smash; the smash-position plumbing is unit-tested and the particle system is the existing one, render path unchanged.

subject: fix: wordmark sits clear of the hero's face on portrait (scrim panel, narrower)

overrides.reason: a CSS layout tweak to the landing wordmark placement; proven live this session at portrait, the render path is unchanged.
